name: SUPER SCORE SHOOTER CLASSIC
short_description: A fast-paced vertical shooter built for short sessions! 2-Minute and 5-Minute score attack modes with beautiful X68000-style pixel art.
detailed_description:
■ 2 Minutes. One Shot at Glory.

Super Star Shooter Classic is a score-attack vertical shooter designed for pure, fast-paced arcade action.
Play for 2 or 5 minutes, dodge intricate bullet patterns, and chase perfection in every run.
Short, intense, and endlessly replayable — a true retro challenge reborn.

■ Features

  • 2-Minute / 5-Minute Modes – Perfect for short, focused play sessions.

  • Online Leaderboards – Compete with players worldwide.

  • Beautiful Pixel Art – Hand-crafted visuals inspired by the X68000 era.

  • Challenging Boss Battles – Learn, dodge, and strike back.

  • Simple Controls, Deep Scoring – Easy to pick up, hard to master.

  • Steam Deck Ready – Quick sessions, full arcade intensity.

■ Recommended For

  • Players who enjoy score-chasing and time-attack challenges.

  • Fans of retro pixel shooters and arcade-style gameplay.

  • Those who want a short yet serious gameplay experience anywhere.
